name: Education
description: Educational institutions, degree programs, vocational training. Campaigns promoting educational opportunities or training programs.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US FTC For-Profit Education Enforcement
regulatory_frameworks.summary: FTC scrutiny on for-profit education advertising. Restrictions on misleading claims about outcomes, graduation rates, and employment prospects.

guidance: For-profit education advertising faces heightened scrutiny. Claims about outcomes must be substantiated. Children's educational products should use the 'children' vertical instead.
